summary: Leakage workflow state machine and useLeakageWorkflow hook: six-step graph with workflow_status transitions, canAdvance guards (evidence reviewed + PII guard), sessionStorage resume. Pure state-machine unit tests; no UI, API, or DB.

interfaceChanges.description: React hook loading fixture by task ID with step navigation and session persistence.
Pure forward step transition with workflow_status mapping.
Blocks evidence step until reviewed and PII guard passes.
sessionStorage resume keyed by task ID.

mappings.criterion: state-machine.ts defines step types, initial state, and transition helpers
useLeakageWorkflow hook loads fixture by task ID, persists state across refresh
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_leakage_workflow_state_machine.test.ts::loads leakage workflow task fixture by task ID

mappings.criterion: Unit test: session resume restores step and payload after simulated reload
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_leakage_workflow_state_machine.test.ts::persists state across refresh and restores step and payload after reload

mappings.criterion: canAdvance blocks progression until evidence is marked reviewed (and PII guard passes)
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_leakage_workflow_state_machine.test.ts::returns false on evidence step when PII guard fails

mappings.criterion: Unit test: forward transitions through full step graph succeed with valid state
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_leakage_workflow_state_machine.test.ts::advances through the full step graph with valid state

mappings.criterion: Unit test: canAdvance returns false when evidence not reviewed
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_leakage_workflow_state_machine.test.ts::returns false on evidence step until evidence is reviewed
web/src/__tests__/test_leakage_workflow_state_machine.test.ts::has no TikTok API or Postgres imports in leakage workflow module
